prepare / learn / recall / remember / migrate / c4

S5 · Anthropic API

span.p:
S6 · Engram memory store
~/.local/share/engram/memory/

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R1: invokes /prepare, /learn, /recall, /remember, /migrate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R2: loads skill markdown on /command and on auto-trigger

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R3: fires SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R4: execs the binary as a subprocess each time the agent's Bash tool runs an engram subcommand

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R5: skill bodies returned to agent context include instructions to shell out to engram subcommands

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R6: session-start.sh runs go build and writes a fresh binary when source files are newer than cached mtime

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R7: emit hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext (and systemMessage) on stdout to inject reminders and the skill-availability banner

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R8: ranks candidates and extracts snippets via Haiku; classifies feedback/facts during learn

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R9: reads CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules, auto-memory, skill frontmatter for ranking

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R10: reads existing feedback + fact TOML during recall/list/show; writes new TOML during learn/remember/update

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R11: prints briefings, recall results, and other subcommand output to stdout, which re-enters the agent's context as the tool result
